Who We Are

Built on Expertise. Driven by Systems.

M/s Valmi Products is a Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar-based precision sheet metal manufacturer with over two decades of experience. We specialize in stamped components, sub-assemblies, and progressive tooling — supplying to Automobile, Electrical, Textile, and Defence OEMs across 8 states.

With a catalog of 1,750+ products, imported high-speed SEYI & SEW presses, and a ready 30-day inventory buffer, we ensure your production lines never stop.

Led by a second-generation management team, Valmi operates through a fully digitalized, system-driven workflow — from New Product Development to final dispatch.

Why Valmi

We Solve the Problems That Hold You Back

Every challenge your supply chain faces, we have built a system to solve it.

Customer Challenge Impact on Business Valmi Solution
Insufficient Technical Competency Quality issues, rework, delays, on-time delivery failures Partnership with specialist tooling vendors · Leadership with 20+ years experience · Continuous staff training
Incompetent Machinery Low production, frequent breakdowns, poor quality Imported high-speed SEYI & SEW presses · Preventive maintenance systems · Skilled maintenance team
Plant Capacity Constraints Limited capacity leading to business stagnation 8,000 sq. ft. manufacturing + 6,000 sq. ft. expanded · Future-ready DMIC Auric City planning
Communication Gaps Lost connections, reduced new business Regular customer visits · Continuous updates · Dedicated coordination team
Long Development Periods Friction in development and delayed launches Flowchart-based NPD management from development to production handover · Stage tracking system
Quality Inconsistency Rework, complaints, line disruption Complaint FMS quick-resolution system · Root cause identification & implementation
Inconsistent On-Time Delivery Line loss, increased costs Real-time FMS monitoring · Schedule vs. compliance tracking · Regular performance reviews
Our Product Range

1,750+ Precision Components

Components, assemblies, and tooling across Automobile, Electrical, Textile, and Defence sectors — manufactured in MS, Brass, Copper, Phosphor Bronze, Aluminum, Stainless Steel, and Spring Steel.

CATEGORY 01

Pressed Components

Single-hit and progressive stamped parts in MS, Brass, Copper, Spring Steel, Aluminium, Stainless Steel, and Phosphor Bronze. Tolerances up to ±0.02mm.

CATEGORY 02

Sub-Assemblies

Welded, riveted, and fastened sub-assemblies combining multiple stamped parts. Projection welding, laser welding, and orbital riveting capabilities.

CATEGORY 03

Tooling & Dies

Stage and progressive tooling designed and manufactured in our in-house tool room. Partnership with specialized vendors with 20+ years of tooling expertise.

What We Process

Material & Surface Treatment Capabilities

In-house and outsourced surface finishing to meet every functional and aesthetic specification.

Material Processing

  • Mild Steel (MS)
  • Brass
  • Copper
  • Phosphor Bronze (PB)
  • Aluminum
  • Stainless Steel
  • Spring Steel
  • Insulation Sheets
  • Polyamide Sheets
  • Wires & Rods

Surface Treatment

  • Zinc Plating
  • Zinc Iron Plating
  • Nickel (Ni) Plating
  • Nickel-Chrome Plating
  • Tin Plating
  • Copper Plating
  • Silver Plating
  • Powder Coating
  • Black Oxidation
  • Gold Plating
Infrastructure

Machine Infrastructure

State-of-the-art imported and domestic machinery ensuring precision, reliability, and zero production downtime.

🏭 Press Shop
  • Imported High-Speed Presses (SEYI & SEW – up to 80T)
  • Other Presses (10T–50T, Jay Shakti, Press Master)
  • NC Feeders · Decoilers
  • Straightener
🔧 Welding & Fabrication
  • Projection Welding Machines
  • CO₂ Welding Machine
  • Laser Welding Machine
  • Orbital Riveting
✨ Finishing & Assembly
  • Tapping Machines
  • Shearing Machines
  • Linear & Round Wire Polishing
  • Tumbling & Vibro Finishing
🔬 Inspection Facilities
  • Profile Projector · Hardness Tester
  • Plating & Powder Coating Thickness Tester
  • Digital Vernier & Micrometer
  • Pin Gauges (up to 4 mm) · Conductivity Meter
🛠️ Tool Room
  • Lathe Machine
  • Hydraulic Surface Grinder
  • Drilling Machine · De-Magnetizer
  • Complete Tooling Equipment Setup

Rieter

Our commitment to quality and reliability has earned the trust of leaders across diverse sectors.

Our Approach

System-Driven Operations

We deliver reliability, consistency, and continuous improvement through integrated digital management systems — so your supply chain never stops.

FMS

Flowchart Management System

Standardizes workflows from order to delivery. Every task has a clear owner, deadline, and escalation path.

DWM

Daily Work Management

Automated daily task emails. Process Coordinator monitors completion — daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly.

IMS

Inventory Management System

BIN Card live tracking with a no-raw-material-shortage policy. 30-day buffer inventory always maintained.

PMS

Production Management System

Product–Machine–Operator–Quantity tracking. Daily production vs. plan with real-time OTD adherence.

MIS

Management Information System

KRA & KPI scorecards for every department. Full accountability through % work done / % on time tracking.

MI

Digital Autopilot Platform

Cloud-based dashboard visualizing all systems live — task bottlenecks, department performance, and FMS stages.

Team Spirit

Celebrations & Team Engagements

Building a culture of togetherness — team trainings, celebrations, and shared milestones that make Valmi Products a great place to work.

Our Team

The Humans Behind the Machines

Valmi is built by people who care — about craft, about colleagues, and about the clients who depend on us every day.

🎓

Continuous Learning

Culture of Care

Growth Mindset

Ownership Culture

Every team member takes ownership of their output. Our KRA/KPI system ensures accountability and rewards consistent high performance.

Recognition

Awards & Recognitions

Our commitment to quality, compliance, and customer satisfaction has been recognised by clients, industry bodies, and the Government of India.

TUV NORD · Certificate No. QM 03 02928

Active Certification
Best Supplier Award

Minda Group – Supplier Performance Award 2007–08 & Annual Supplier Conference 2016. Recognised for excellence in quality and delivery.

Quality Excellence Award

UNO Minda – Achieving <100 PPM in FY 2015–16. Best Performing Supplier recognition for superior quality standards.

CBDT Silver Category

Central Board of Direct Taxes – Silver Category taxpayer recognition for Assessment Year 2019–20.

GST Compliance Award

Ministry of Finance – Recognised for prompt GST filing and payment for FY 2022–23.

ZED Bronze Certificate

MSME Sustainable ZED Certification – Zero Defect, Zero Effect manufacturing compliance.

Partner Appreciation

Lauritz Knudsen (formerly L&T Switchgear) – recognised in June 2024 for valued support in building their legacy.
